findings.title: n8n Ni8mare — Unauthenticated Full-Chain RCE via File Read + Sandbox Bypass
findings.summary: Public PoC chains CVE-2026-21858 (Content-Type confusion arbitrary file read) with CVE-2025-68613 (expression injection sandbox bypass) for unauthenticated RCE on n8n workflow automation instances, with exposed instances visible on LeakIX.

findings.title: BeyondTrust RS/PRA Critical Command Injection — Same Endpoint as Prior Zero-Day
findings.affected_technology: BeyondTrust Remote Support / Privileged Remote Access
findings.summary: Rapid7 reproduced a critical command injection in BeyondTrust RS/PRA in the same endpoint as previously exploited zero-day CVE-2024-12356, making exploitation highly likely despite no known in-the-wild activity yet.

findings.title: osTicket File Read to RCE via PHP Filters and CNEXT Chain
findings.summary: Horizon3.ai released a fully automated PoC exploiting PHP filters in osTicket mPDF library for arbitrary file exfiltration chained to RCE via CVE-2024-2961 (CNEXT).

findings.title: MuddyWater Deploys Dindoor Backdoor on U.S. Bank, Airport, Defense Software Networks
findings.summary: Iranian state-sponsored MuddyWater embedded in networks of U.S. banks, airports, and defense software companies using new Deno-based Dindoor backdoor and Python Fakeset backdoor, with data exfiltration attempts via Rclone to Wasabi cloud storage.

findings.title: FBI Confirms Breach of Surveillance and Wiretap Warrant Systems
findings.summary: FBI confirmed a breach affecting systems used to manage surveillance and wiretap warrants, with potential connections to earlier Salt Typhoon Chinese state-sponsored campaign against U.S. telecom infrastructure.

findings.title: Telnet RCE via Malformed USER Environment Variable
findings.summary: SafeBreach Labs released a public PoC for remote code execution in Telnet servers through exploitation of a malformed USER environment variable, with the exploit gaining rapid community attention.

findings.title: node-tar Arbitrary File Overwrite Vulnerability
findings.summary: PoC released for arbitrary file overwrite vulnerability in node-tar versions before 7.5.3, a widely-used npm package for tar archive handling with significant downstream supply chain impact potential.

findings.title: Zammad IDOR and SQL Injection Disclosed by GitHub Security Lab
findings.summary: GitHub Security Lab disclosed an IDOR vulnerability (GHSL-2026-049) enabling access control violations and a SQL injection flaw (GHSL-2026-047) allowing sensitive data leakage in Zammad helpdesk software.

findings.title: CISA Issues Emergency Directive 26-03 for Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN
findings.summary: CISA escalated CVE-2026-20127 to Emergency Directive 26-03, requiring federal agencies to inventory SD-WAN systems, apply mitigations, and assess for compromise, reflecting expanded exploitation scope.

noted.summary: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability disclosed in Wekan project management software.
Unauthorized data manipulation vulnerability disclosed in Wekan project management software.
Access control bypass vulnerability (GHSL-2026-040) disclosed in AFFiNE knowledge management platform.
Cisco patched 48 vulnerabilities across ASA, Firepower Management Center, and Firepower Threat Defense products.
Weaponized EncystPHP web shell exploiting CVE-2025-64328 enables persistent remote command execution in FreePBX environments.
